name: Cron - Sync Uber Eats Orders (Future)
notes:
FUTURE IMPLEMENTATION: This workflow will sync orders from Uber Eats API every 15 minutes. When implemented, it will:

1. Authenticate with Uber Eats OAuth
2. Fetch new orders from restaurant account
3. Match Uber menu items with local dish_id in Appwrite
4. Call the webhook-orders workflow for each order
5. Store sync timestamp to prevent duplicates

This requires:
- Uber Eats API credentials (obtainable from partner dashboard)
- n8n HTTP Node to Uber API
- Item mapping logic between Uber menu and local dishes
- Error handling for order sync failures
